documents.title: Model Selection Strategy
documents.preview: Tiered approach to choosing AI models by cost and capability. Kimi first, Haiku default, Sonnet for complex reasoning.

documents.title: Rate Limits & Budget Management
documents.preview: Hard constraints: $5 daily, $200 monthly. 5s between API calls, 10s between searches. Batch work to stay under budget.

documents.title: Cache Hit Strategy
documents.preview: Maximize LLM cache efficiency: batch requests in 5-min windows, keep system prompts stable, organize context hierarchically.

documents.title: Anil's Origin Story
documents.preview: From childhood trauma through spiritual awakening. The story that frames everything: pain to purpose, self-abandonment to self-love.

documents.title: Numerology Daily Energy Strategy
documents.preview: Daily numerology readings across 4 platforms. Build spiritual authority, grow audience, generate leads for $97-497 readings.

documents.title: UGC Content Playbook
documents.preview: GenX angle on apps, fintech, tech. 5-7 videos/week via Bento Backstage. Target: $1K in 30 days, $30K by mid-year.

documents.title: Gentleman's Vault — Complete Business Blueprint
documents.preview: 12-part comprehensive blueprint: market analysis, pricing ($97-$497/mo), Skool setup, 5 content pillars, month-by-month roadmap, marketing funnel, financials, KPIs. Target: $10K+/mo by Month 6.

documents.title: Gentleman's Vault — Video Script Library
documents.preview: Complete production-ready video script library: 25 scripts across 5 categories (Launch, Sales, Educational, Community, Evergreen). Each script includes hook, body, CTA, and platform notes. Ready for immediate filming with status tracker.

documents.preview: Complete overhaul of service offerings and pricing. 4-tier architecture ($97-$5,000): Quick Read, Full Chart + Coaching, Deep Dive Coaching, Premium Freedom Blueprint. 6 new service ideas (Corporate Escape Coaching, Business Birth Chart, Partner Reading, Monthly Program, Group Workshop, Year Numbers). Premium positioning strategy with sales copy samples and implementation roadmap. Potential: $11K+/month.

documents.title: UGC Business Plan — Complete Strategy ($1K → $30K)
documents.preview: Comprehensive UGC business plan: market analysis, 5 niche breakdown (FinTech $10-15K, Productivity $6-12K, Health $5K, Coaching $5-8K, AI $8-10K), 50+ brand targets, daily workflow, 4 email templates, competitive analysis, revenue projections Month 1-6 ($1K → $20K+). Differentiation: GenX authenticity, niche mastery, 48-72hr turnaround.
